remarks: Summer starts here! Move in ready Cranbury home on a level, park-like half-acre offering exceptional indoor-outdoor living. The spectacular backyard is your private oasis, featuring a 2023/2024 POOL, expansive maintenance-free deck, custom STONE PATIO ,GAZEBO w/TV and sound system-perfect for entertaining or relaxing all season. The stunning renovated kitchen is the heart of the home, showcasing Carrara marble countertops, white cabinetry, bluestone flooring, s/s appliances, beverage chiller, and an oversized center island with seating. Skylights and cathedral ceilings fill the living room, dining room, and primary bedroom with natural light, while handcrafted wood floors and a cozy wood-burning stove add warmth and character.  The primary bedroom offers bamboo flooring, a walk-in closet, and skylights. Three additional bedrooms provide flexibility for family, guests, or a home office, plus an updated powder room. Major recent improvements include a newer roof, high-efficiency oil heating system, newer windows and doors, irrigation system, and quality updates throughout. Ideally located near shopping, restaurants, parks, and everyday amenities, this move-in ready home offers style, comfort, and resort-like living all year long.
